project_description: The Park District is requesting  $2,000,851 from the Woodlawn TIF for HVAC replacement and energy savings to the Harris Park fieldhouse.    The new heating and cooling systems will be integrated into the Park District-s web-based building automated system, and is part of the District-s district wide $20M energy savings program.

column299: The existing track and natural lawn athletic field on the north side of Dunbar Park is planned to be renovated.  The renovation consists of a combination artificial turf field striped for football and soccer, a six lane track, and sports lighting.
column317: Williams Park is a 8.5-acre Chicago Park District park located at 2820 S State Street within the Douglas community area.   The park is situated between the Chicago Public Schools Drake Elementary School and the Chicago Housing Authority Dearborn Homes.   The Chicago Park District partnering with the Chicago Housing Authority to construct a new 11,200 square foot fieldhouse at Williams Park.  The fieldhouse will include a half court gymnasium, multi-purpose club rooms for art, education, performance, meetings and exercise rooms.  CHA is contributing $6M for this project as it benefits the adjacent Dearborn Homes.
